name: Antipasto Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces provolone cheese, cut into 2 x 1/4 inch strips
9 oz. package frozen spinach, thawed, squeezed to drain
6 ounces jar marinated artichoke hearts, drained/chopped
6 ounces can pitted ripe olives, drained/sliced
1 1/2 cups prepared creamy Italian salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook tortellini to desired doneness as directed on package; drain and rinse with cold water.
2. In a very large bowl, combine tortellini, salami, provolone cheese, corn, spinach, artichoke hearts, and 1 cup of the olives.
3. In a small bowl, combine salad dressing, mustard, and 1/4 cup of the Parmesan cheese; blend well.
4. Pour dressing over salad and toss gently.
5. Top with remaining olives and Parmesan cheese.
6. Cover and refrigerate 1 - 2 hours to blend flavors.
7. Just before serving, garnish with pimiento (if desired).
